title: get_root_dashboard
description: Verify that a GET request to the root endpoint '/' returns a 200 status code with the SPA dashboard HTML/JS and route metadata.

title: post_start_comment_collection
description: Test starting a YouTube comment collection task with valid video_id and options, expecting a 202 Accepted response with task_id and started status.

title: get_collection_status
description: Check that a GET request to '/status' returns a 200 status code with the current collection task status including task_id and running state.

title: post_stop_collection_task
description: Verify stopping a comment collection task by posting a valid task_id to '/stop' returns appropriate success response; also test stopping with nonexistent task_id returns 404 Not Found.

title: get_collection_history
description: Ensure that GET '/history' returns a 200 status code with a list of past collection tasks including collected comment counts.

title: post_analysis_preprocess
description: Test POST to '/analysis/analyze' with action 'preprocess' and valid video_ids triggers preprocessing, returning 200 with job_id and preprocessing status.

title: post_analysis_preprocess_bad_input
description: Verify that preprocessing with malformed CSV input returns 400 Bad Request with error message 'malformed CSV' and that results query for such job_id returns 404 Not Found.

title: post_analysis_hybrid_pipeline
description: Test hybrid analysis pipeline by POSTing to '/analysis/analyze' with mode 'hybrid', valid video_ids, and llm_token_fraction, expecting 200 with job_id and local_nlp_running stage.

title: post_analysis_hybrid_llm_skipped
description: Verify that hybrid analysis with missing LLM API key returns 200 with job_id and note indicating LLM was skipped and fallback to local NLP, and results reflect local NLP only.

title: post_analysis_sna_mode
description: Test SNA mode by POSTing to '/analysis/analyze' with mode 'sna' and compute_network true, expecting 200 with job_id and sna_running status, and GET results returns network map, cluster metrics, and distortion alerts.
